# Project State — Marine Guardian Command Center
# Auto-generated by Claude Code after every task. Never edit manually. (File path kept in .cline/ for historical continuity; Cline deprecated V31.)
# Updated: 2026-05-20 00:10 GMT+8 by CLAUDE_CODE (Opus 4.7 — Sub-batch 4.1d SHIPPED to main pending squash)

PHASE:        Phase 8 Batch 4 IN PROGRESS. Sub-batches 4.1a (AreaBoundary) + 4.1b (PatrolTrack) + 4.1c (FuelEntry + ReportExport) + 4.1d (NotificationRecipient split + data migration) implemented and verified. 4 of 5 shipped to/pending-ship-to main. 1 sub-batch remains (4.1e Event/Patrol attribution FKs + Tenant ArcGIS fields).

LAST_DONE:    Sub-batch 4.1d NotificationRecipient split with data migration SHIPPED to main via squash-merge as d32e618 (feature branch feat/notification-recipient-split deleted post-merge per Rule 23). 15 files changed, +564 / -155 lines. Includes the original feature commit (7ecab44) + the governance writes commit (f3366be) collapsed into one feat commit on main. Schema delta on Notification: removed userId+isRead, added subjectId nullable FK to Subject (SET NULL); removed indexes user_id+is_read; added index subject_id. New NotificationRecipient model: cuid PK, notification_id FK CASCADE, user_id FK NO ACTION, is_read default false, read_at nullable, email_sent_at nullable, email_status enum default pending, created_at; 3 indexes (notification_id, (user_id, is_read), (user_id, created_at DESC)). New enum NotificationEmailStatus{pending, sent, suppressed_by_cooldown, digested, failed}. Back-relations updated: User.notifications → User.notificationRecipients; Subject.notifications added; Notification.recipients added. Migration 20260519233500_add_notification_recipient_split: 14-step DDL — CREATE enum + table + 3 indexes + 2 FKs FIRST, then backfill INSERT (1 NotificationRecipient row per existing Notification preserving user_id+is_read+created_at, using deterministic md5-derived ID `'c' || substring(md5('nr_' || id || '_' || user_id) FROM 1 FOR 24)` for idempotent re-run during recovery), THEN drop indexes + FK + columns on notifications + add subject_id + FK + index. Hand-written down.sql reverses in 10 steps with lossy restore (picks earliest recipient per notification via DISTINCT ON when N>1). Pre-flight: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications → 0 rows in dev → backfill ran as no-op but the SQL is correct for staging/prod safety. Migration applied cleanly to dev DB; \d notifications confirms user_id+is_read columns dropped, subject_id added with FK + index; \d notification_recipients confirms new table with 3 indexes + 2 FKs (cascade on notification delete, no-action on user delete). Plan corrections caught during main-session pre-flight inspection against v2 spec L480-484: (1) STATE.md plan said move notificationType to NotificationRecipient — WRONG, v2 spec keeps it on Notification (alert type doesn't vary per recipient), (2) plan omitted read_at field — added per v2 L483, (3) plan implied email_status was a string default — actually requires the 5-value enum. Router rewrite of apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/notification.ts: all 4 procedures (list/markRead/markAllRead/unreadCount) now query prisma.notificationRecipient.* with nested join filter `notification: {tenantId: ctx.tenantId}` for tenant scoping + top-level `userId: ctx.userId` for user scoping; markRead+markAllRead set BOTH isRead=true AND readAt=new Date() per v2 spec L483; list returns FLATTENED shape so item.id surfaces as recipient.id and UI's markRead({id: n.id}) naturally targets the recipient. Tests: notification.test.ts went 6 → 10 cases with 3 NEW pathways (cross-user markRead silent reject — proves userId filter in WHERE is load-bearing, user-scoped markAllRead, flattened shape mapping). Consumers: exports/notifications/route.ts rewritten to query notificationRecipient.findMany with same nested-filter pattern; CSV's ID column still uses notification.id (not recipient.id) for backward-compat with older CSV consumers. UI page apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/notifications/page.tsx needed ZERO edits — router's flattened return shape matches what the page consumed. SSE Route Handler + sidebar + realtime-store + poller all no-op (shape decoupled from DB column shape). 262 tests passing across 37 files (was 260; +2 net new). typecheck 0 / lint 0 (--max-warnings 0). 3 new lessons added: 🔴 "prisma migrate dev hangs on stale advisory locks from backgrounded prior runs" + 🟤 "Backfill SQL inside Prisma migrations should use deterministic md5 IDs for idempotency" + 🟤 "v2 spec is authoritative — verify against PRODUCT.md before trusting STATE.md plan text".

NEXT:         Open a FRESH Claude Code session and say "Start Sub-batch 4.1e" to begin Event/Patrol attribution columns + Tenant ArcGIS fields. 4.1e is Tier 2 (~6 files, ~25K tokens) — pure additive schema work with no data migration risk. See BATCH 4 PLAN below.
